jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at PhonePe
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
